based_on: Byte-precise mutation of fixtures/external/pytorch.sgd-momentum.multi-step.golden.jsonl. v0.9.2 classical PyTorch-style SGD momentum multi-step adversarial plate.

mutation.explanation: Multi-step classical PyTorch-style SGD momentum requires every parameter's buffer to chain forward unbroken: receipts[k+1].state_before.buffer == receipts[k].state_after.buffer. Mutating step 1's state_before.buffer to step 0's state_before.buffer (instead of step 0's state_after.buffer) breaks the chain. Rule 25 catches the discrepancy (Rule 9 analog for optimizer state).

reconciliation_check_targeted_first: Rule 25: Optimizer-state chain broken — receipts[1].state_before.buffer does not match receipts[0].state_after.buffer for the same parameter.
purpose: v0.9.2 momentum multi-step anti-circularity fixture (kind: 'stale-buffer'). Pressure-tests that the named multi-step rule fires BEFORE the reconciler consults fixture_status metadata.
v0_9_2_trust_framing: Rule 25 (multi-step optimizer-state chain — momentum buffer chain) is a STRUCTURAL consistency check. Producer-authenticity caveat per Rule 17 / Fang et al. 2023 applies.
